name: pduProviderRef::GetSubscribedConsumer
title: pduProviderRef::GetSubscribedConsumer
description: Returns the subscribed consumer with the specified index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the consumer. The condition 0 <= index < pduProviderRef::GetNrOfSubscribedConsumers must be true.

return: The specified service consumer. An uninitialized object if the index is invalid.
